violations.description: HTML element is missing the lang attribute.
Global CSS '* { outline: none; }' removes all focus indicators.
violations.reference_fix: Remove 'outline: none'. Add: *:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1db954; outline-offset: 2px; }

violations.description: Media player control buttons (⏮, ⏪, ▶, ⏩, ⏭) use only emoji symbols with no aria-label. Screen readers cannot determine button purpose.
violations.reference_fix:
<button class="ctrl-btn" aria-label="Previous track">⏮</button>
<button class="ctrl-btn" aria-label="Rewind 15 seconds">⏪</button>
<button class="ctrl-btn play" aria-label="Play">▶</button>
<button class="ctrl-btn" aria-label="Forward 15 seconds">⏩</button>
<button class="ctrl-btn" aria-label="Next track">⏭</button>

violations.description: Progress bar and volume slider are custom div-based controls with no role='slider', aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax. They are not operable or readable by assistive technology.
violations.reference_fix: <div class="progress-bar" role="slider" aria-label="Playback progress" aria-valuenow="35" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100" tabindex="0">

violations.description: Transcript toggle is a <div> with cursor:pointer, not a <button>. It lacks keyboard accessibility and has no aria-expanded state.
Search button contains only a 🔍 emoji with no aria-label or accessible text.

page_description: A podcast player platform with custom media controls, progress/volume sliders, episode list, and transcript toggle. Issues include missing lang, no focus indicators, unlabeled media controls, non-semantic sliders, inaccessible transcript toggle, and unlabeled search button.
